parameters.query:
INSERT INTO orders (order_code, customer_name, total_amount, status, region, created_at)
SELECT
  'ORD-DEMO-' || generate_series,
  'Khach hang ' || generate_series,
  floor(random() * 900000 + 100000),
  CASE 
    WHEN random() < 0.7 THEN 'completed'
    WHEN random() < 0.9 THEN 'pending'
    ELSE 'cancelled'
  END,
  CASE 
    WHEN random() < 0.33 THEN 'Ha Noi'
    WHEN random() < 0.66 THEN 'Da Nang'
    ELSE 'Ho Chi Minh'
  END,
  NOW() - (random() * INTERVAL '12 hours')
FROM generate_series(1, 30);
